description: Multi-agent Python pipeline automating local business prospecting. User inputs a free-text geographic query (e.g. 'peluquerías Ávila centro'), system runs 4 agents: Maps scraper → contact extractor → web analyzer → AI scoring. Exposed via FastAPI with SQLite persistence.
title: Prospector Local - Full Implementation

close_reason: All scaffold files created and committed in worktree-agent-ab932382
description: Create the complete project structure from scratch. Files needed: app/config.py (pydantic-settings), app/db/database.py (SQLAlchemy engine+session+init_db), app/models/orm.py (Business ORM with all fields from spec), app/models/business.py (Pydantic v2 schemas: BusinessCreate, BusinessOut, JobStatus), app/routers/__init__.py, app/agents/__init__.py, app/models/__init__.py, app/db/__init__.py, requirements.txt (pinned versions: fastapi, uvicorn, playwright, sqlalchemy, pydantic>=2, anthropic, python-dotenv, httpx, beautifulsoup4), .env.example (ANTHROPIC_API_KEY, DATABASE_URL=sqlite:///./prospector.db, PAGESPEED_API_KEY). Also update CLAUDE.md Project Overview and Tech Stack sections. Business table fields: id, nombre, categoria, direccion, telefono, email, website, rating_google, num_reseñas, tiene_web (bool), web_score (int 1-5), oportunidad_score (int 1-5), oportunidad_razon (text), web_es_mobile (bool), web_velocidad_ms (int), maps_url, zona_busqueda, fecha_scraping (datetime), estado (enum: pendiente/analizado/contactado/vendido).
title: Project Scaffolding

description: Implement app/agents/agent1_maps.py. Full Playwright async scraper for Google Maps. Takes query string + max_results. Steps: launch browser headless, navigate to maps.google.com, search query, wait for results feed (role='feed'), scroll panel fully extracting all results up to max_results. Extract per business: nombre, categoria, direccion, telefono, maps_url, rating_google, num_reseñas, website (if shown). Use stable selectors: data-item-id, role='feed', jsaction attributes. Add 1000ms+ delays between actions. Return List[dict]. Full try/except with logging. No stubs.
title: Agent 1 - Google Maps Scraper

description: Implement app/agents/agent2_contact.py. Takes a business dict with optional website URL. If website present: use httpx async to fetch page, BeautifulSoup4 to extract email addresses (regex), social media links (facebook, instagram, twitter/x), any additional contact info. Returns dict with: email, redes_sociales (dict), raw_html snippet. Handle connection errors, timeouts (10s), non-HTML responses gracefully. Full try/except with logging.
title: Agent 2 - Contact Extractor

description: Implement app/agents/agent3_web.py. Takes website URL. Two checks: (1) PageSpeed Insights API call via httpx async to v5 API, extract: performance score, FCP, LCP, mobile-friendly flag, load time ms. (2) Playwright screenshot (viewport 375x812 mobile). Returns dict: web_score (1-5 derived from perf score), web_es_mobile (bool), web_velocidad_ms (int), screenshot_path (str). Handle missing API key gracefully (skip PageSpeed, still score). Full try/except with logging.
title: Agent 3 - Web Analyzer

description: Implement app/agents/agent4_scoring.py. Uses Anthropic SDK (claude-sonnet-4-20250514). Takes full business dict. If no website (tiene_web=False): return score=5, razon='Sin presencia web, máxima oportunidad'. Otherwise: build structured prompt and ask Claude to return JSON {score: int 1-5, razon: str}. Score meaning: 5=sin web/muy mala, 1=web perfecta. Return dict {oportunidad_score, oportunidad_razon}. Full try/except with logging.
title: Agent 4 - AI Scoring

description: Implement app/main.py (FastAPI app with lifespan calling init_db, include routers), app/routers/search.py (POST /search body={query,max_results} → BackgroundTasks pipeline → {job_id,status}; GET /businesses with optional ?score=&zona= filters; GET /businesses/{id}; GET /jobs/{job_id} → {status,count}), app/pipeline.py (async orchestrator calling agents 1→2→3→4 in sequence per business, saving to DB, updating job status). Use in-memory dict for job tracking. SQLAlchemy async session from app/db/database.py. All endpoints return proper Pydantic response models.
title: FastAPI Routes + Pipeline Orchestrator

description: Implement tests/test_agent1.py. Basic functional test for Agent 1 (Maps Scraper): mock Playwright or use a real short query to verify the agent returns a list of dicts with expected keys (nombre, categoria, maps_url). Also add tests/test_pipeline.py with at least one FastAPI TestClient test for POST /search and GET /businesses. Use pytest + pytest-asyncio.
title: Basic Tests

description: Replace anthropic SDK with openai SDK pointing to Groq. Changes: 1) requirements.txt: remove anthropic, add openai. 2) app/config.py: rename anthropic_api_key → groq_api_key. 3) app/agents/agent4_scoring.py: replace AsyncAnthropic client with AsyncOpenAI client (base_url=https://api.groq.com/openai/v1, api_key=groq_api_key), update model to a Groq model (llama-3.3-70b-versatile or similar). 4) .env.example: fix placeholder (sk-ant-... → gsk_...).
title: Swap agent4_scoring from Anthropic to Groq (OpenAI-compatible)

description: app/agents/agent1_maps.py _extract_business_details: selectors 'span.ceNzKf[aria-hidden=true]' are outdated. Replace with broader approach: 1) Try aria-label on buttons/spans containing 'estrellas' or 'stars' pattern like '4,5 estrellas' and parse the number. 2) Try span[aria-hidden=true] inside .F7nice. 3) Fallback: find any span[aria-hidden=true] whose text matches a float pattern like '4,5' or '4.5'. For num_reseñas also verify selectors still work.
title: Fix rating_google: update Google Maps scraper selectors

description: 3 fixes in the pipeline: 1) agent1_maps: skip business if nombre is 'Resultados' or similar UI noise (check nombre against a blacklist). 2) agent1_maps._extract_business_details: detect social media URLs (facebook.com, instagram.com, twitter.com, x.com, linkedin.com, tiktok.com, youtube.com) — if website matches, set website='' and tiene_web=False, and set a new field web_red_social='facebook'/'instagram'/etc. 3) Add web_red_social field: orm.py (String(50) nullable), business.py (both BusinessCreate and BusinessOut). DB migration: add ALTER TABLE fallback in init_db(). 4) agent4_scoring.py: add logger.debug before the API call showing exactly what JSON body is sent to Groq.
title: Filter social URLs, skip fake businesses, log Groq payload

description: Epic for 3 parallel improvements to the web analysis pipeline.
title: Improve web analysis: PSI keyless + scraping + social blacklist

description: app/agents/agent3_web.py: Remove the 'if settings.pagespeed_api_key:' guard. Always call PageSpeed Insights (it works without a key at ~1 req/s). Only add 'key' param if settings.pagespeed_api_key is non-empty AND not a placeholder (not equal to 'your-key-here'). This fixes the 400 errors caused by the literal placeholder string being sent as a key.
title: Fix PageSpeed: always call PSI without API key

description: app/agents/agent1_maps.py: Add to SOCIAL_DOMAINS dict: booking.com→'booking', tripadvisor.com→'tripadvisor', yelp.com→'yelp', whatsapp.com→'whatsapp', wa.me→'whatsapp', t.me→'telegram', linktr.ee→'linktree', google.com/maps→skip(already filtered). Also add 'maps.google.com'. These sites masquerade as a business website but are not real web presences.
title: Expand social/booking URL blacklist in agent1_maps

description: Two-part change: 1) app/agents/agent3_web.py: add _scrape_web_content(url) async function using httpx+BeautifulSoup4. Extract: page title, meta description, h1/h2/h3 headings, first paragraphs (limit output to ~3000 chars). Return as web_contenido key in analyze_web() result dict. Also add cookie banner dismissal in the Playwright screenshot section (click button with text 'Aceptar'/'Accept'/'Rechazar'/'Reject' before screenshot). 2) app/agents/agent4_scoring.py: Update SCORING_PROMPT and score_business() to use web_contenido (scraped page text) as main analysis input for Groq, plus PageSpeed metrics as structured context. If web_contenido is empty, fall back to structured summary. Update the prompt to ask Groq to analyze actual page content.
title: Scrape webpage text and send to Groq for AI analysis

description: Add a DELETE /businesses endpoint in app/routers/search.py that deletes all rows from the businesses table and returns {deleted: N}. Use SQLAlchemy delete() statement. Single file change.
title: Add DELETE /businesses endpoint to delete all businesses

description: app/agents/agent3_web.py: wrap the PageSpeed call in a retry loop. On 429, wait 2 seconds and retry once. If still 429 after retry, log as warning (not error) and continue without PageSpeed data. Change the except block to specifically catch httpx.HTTPStatusError with status 429.
title: Fix PageSpeed 429: retry with backoff
